1→<Window x:Class="TmRobotEx.MainWindow"
     2→        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
     3→        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
     4→        xmlns:helix="http://helix-toolkit.org/wpf"
     5→        Title="TmRobot Ex — TM12 + OnRobot Screwdriver"
     6→        Width="1920" Height="1080"
     7→        Background="#FF1E1E1E" WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
     8→        WindowState="Maximized"
     9→        Icon="fauto.ico" Closing="Window_Closing">
    10→
    11→    <Window.Resources>
    12→        <!-- 공통 버튼 -->
    13→        <Style x:Key="BtnStyle" TargetType="Button">
    14→            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF3C3C3C"/>
    15→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFE0E0E0"/>
    16→            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#FF555555"/>
    17→            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
    18→            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="10,4"/>
    19→            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2"/>
    20→            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
    21→            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
    22→        </Style>
    23→
    24→        <!-- 라벨 -->
    25→        <Style x:Key="LblStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
    26→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFB0B0B0"/>
    27→            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
    28→        </Style>
    29→
    30→        <!-- 섹션 헤더 -->
    31→        <Style x:Key="HeaderStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
    32→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFE0E0E0"/>
    33→            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="13"/>
    34→            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
    35→            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,0,0,4"/>
    36→        </Style>
    37→
    38→        <!-- 입력 TextBox -->
    39→        <Style x:Key="InputStyle" TargetType="TextBox">
    40→            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF2D2D30"/>
    41→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFE0E0E0"/>
    42→            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#FF555555"/>
    43→            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="4,2"/>
    44→            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
    45→        </Style>
    46→
    47→        <!-- 구분선 -->
    48→        <Style x:Key="SepStyle" TargetType="Separator">
    49→            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF3E3E42"/>
    50→            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,6"/>
    51→        </Style>
    52→    </Window.Resources>
    53→
    54→    <DockPanel>
    55→        <!-- ═══ 메뉴바 ═══ -->
    56→        <Menu DockPanel.Dock="Top" Background="#FF2D2D30" Foreground="#FFE0E0E0" FontSize="12">
    57→            <MenuItem Header="연결(_C)">
    58→                <MenuItem x:Name="MenuRobotConnect" Header="로봇 연결" Click="MenuRobotConnect_Click"/>
    59→                <MenuItem x:Name="MenuRobotDisconnect" Header="로봇 해제" Click="MenuRobotDisconnect_Click" IsEnabled="False"/>
    60→                <Separator/>
    61→                <MenuItem x:Name="MenuBridgeStart" Header="브릿지 시작" Click="MenuBridgeStart_Click"/>
    62→                <MenuItem x:Name="MenuBridgeStop" Header="브릿지 중지" Click="MenuBridgeStop_Click" IsEnabled="False"/>
    63→            </MenuItem>
    64→            <MenuItem Header="시나리오(_S)">
    65→                <MenuItem Header="새 시나리오" Click="MenuScenarioNew_Click"/>
    66→                <MenuItem Header="불러오기..." Click="MenuScenarioLoad_Click"/>
    67→                <MenuItem Header="저장..." Click="MenuScenarioSave_Click"/>
    68→            </MenuItem>
    69→            <MenuItem Header="설정(_O)" Click="MenuSettings_Click"/>
    70→        </Menu>
    71→
    72→        <!-- ═══ 상태바 ═══ -->
    73→        <StatusBar DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Background="#FF252528" Height="26">
    74→            <StatusBarItem>
    75→                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
    76→                    <Ellipse x:Name="IndRobot" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#FF666666" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
    77→                    <TextBlock x:Name="TxtStatusRobot" Text="로봇: 미연결" Foreground="#FF909090" FontSize="11"/>
    78→                </StackPanel>
    79→            </StatusBarItem>
    80→            <Separator Background="#FF3E3E42"/>
    81→            <StatusBarItem>
    82→                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
    83→                    <Ellipse x:Name="IndBridge" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#FF666666" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
    84→                    <TextBlock x:Name="TxtStatusBridge" Text="브릿지: 중지" Foreground="#FF909090" FontSize="11"/>
    85→                </StackPanel>
    86→            </StatusBarItem>
    87→            <Separator Background="#FF3E3E42"/>
    88→            <StatusBarItem>
    89→                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
    90→                    <Ellipse x:Name="IndCb" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#FF666666" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
    91→                    <TextBlock x:Name="TxtStatusCb" Text="CB: 미연결" Foreground="#FF909090" FontSize="11"/>
    92→                </StackPanel>
    93→            </StatusBarItem>
    94→            <Separator Background="#FF3E3E42"/>
    95→            <StatusBarItem>
    96→                <TextBlock x:Name="TxtUpdateRate" Text="갱신: -" Foreground="#FF909090" FontSize="11"/>
    97→            </StatusBarItem>
    98→        </StatusBar>
    99→
   100→        <!-- ═══ 우측 패널 ═══ -->
   101→        <Border DockPanel.Dock="Right" Width="560" Background="#FF252528"
   102→                BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="1,0,0,0"
   103→                Panel.ZIndex="10">
   104→          <Grid>
   105→                <Grid.RowDefinitions>
   106→                    <RowDefinition Height="*" MinHeight="200"/>
   107→                    <RowDefinition Height="5"/>
   108→                    <RowDefinition Height="200" MinHeight="100"/>
   109→                    <RowDefinition Height="5"/>
   110→                    <RowDefinition Height="220" MinHeight="100"/>
   111→                </Grid.RowDefinitions>
   112→
   113→                <!-- ═══ 우측 상단: 작업판 ═══ -->
   114→                <Border Grid.Row="0" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0,0,0,0" Margin="6,6,6,0">
   115→                    <DockPanel>
   116→                        <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="작업판 (9×15)" Style="{StaticResource HeaderStyle}"/>
   117→                        <!-- 통계 -->
   118→                        <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,4,0,0">
   119→                            <TextBlock Text="총:" Style="{StaticResource LblStyle}" Margin="0,0,2,0"/>
   120→                            <TextBlock x:Name="TxtPlateTotal" Text="135" Foreground="#FFE0E0E0" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,10,0"/>
   121→                            <TextBlock Text="OK:" Style="{StaticResource LblStyle}" Margin="0,0,2,0"/>
   122→                            <TextBlock x:Name="TxtPlateOk" Text="0" Foreground="#FF60C060" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,10,0"/>
   123→                            <TextBlock Text="NG:" Style="{StaticResource LblStyle}" Margin="0,0,2,0"/>
   124→                            <TextBlock x:Name="TxtPlateNg" Text="0" Foreground="#FFC06060" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,10,0"/>
   125→                            <TextBlock Text="진행률:" Style="{StaticResource LblStyle}" Margin="0,0,2,0"/>
   126→                            <TextBlock x:Name="TxtPlatePercent" Text="0%" Foreground="#FFE0E0E0" FontSize="12"/>
   127→                        </StackPanel>
   128→                        <!-- 작업판 Canvas 영역 -->
   129→                        <Border Background="#FF1A1A1D" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="2">
   130→                            <Canvas x:Name="WorkPlateCanvas" ClipToBounds="True"/>
   131→                        </Border>
   132→                    </DockPanel>
   133→                </Border>
   134→
   135→                <GridSplitter Grid.Row="1" Height="5" Background="#FF3E3E42"
   136→                              HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"/>
   137→
   138→                <!-- ═══ 우측 중간: 시나리오 ═══ -->
   139→                <Border Grid.Row="2" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0" Margin="6,0,6,0">
   140→                    <DockPanel>
   141→                        <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="시나리오" Style="{StaticResource HeaderStyle}"/>
   142→                        <!-- 시나리오 버튼바 -->
   143→                        <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Top" Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
   144→                            <Button x:Name="BtnScenarioRun" Content="▶ 실행" Style="{StaticResource BtnStyle}"
   145→                                    Width="70" Click="BtnScenarioRun_Click"/>
   146→                            <Button x:Name="BtnScenarioStop" Content="■ 정지" Style="{StaticResource BtnStyle}"
   147→                                    Width="70" Click="BtnScenarioStop_Click" IsEnabled="False"/>
   148→                            <Button x:Name="BtnScenarioAdd" Content="+ 추가" Style="{StaticResource BtnStyle}"
   149→                                    Width="70" Click="BtnScenarioAdd_Click"/>
   150→                            <Button x:Name="BtnScenarioRemove" Content="- 삭제" Style="{StaticResource BtnStyle}"
   151→                                    Width="70" Click="BtnScenarioRemove_Click"/>
   152→                            <Button x:Name="BtnScenarioUp" Content="▲" Style="{StaticResource BtnStyle}"
   153→                                    Width="36" Click="BtnScenarioUp_Click"/>
   154→                            <Button x:Name="BtnScenarioDown" Content="▼" Style="{StaticResource BtnStyle}"
   155→                                    Width="36" Click="BtnScenarioDown_Click"/>
   156→                        </StackPanel>
   157→                        <!-- 진행 상태 -->
   158→                        <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" x:Name="TxtScenarioStatus"
   159→                                   Text="대기 중" Foreground="#FF909090" FontSize="11" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
   160→                        <!-- 시나리오 목록 -->
   161→                        <ListBox x:Name="LstScenario"
   162→                                 Background="#FF1E1E1E" Foreground="#FFE0E0E0"
   163→                                 BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="1"
   164→                                 FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="11"
   165→                                 SelectionChanged="LstScenario_SelectionChanged"/>
   166→                    </DockPanel>
   167→                </Border>
   168→
   169→                <GridSplitter Grid.Row="3" Height="5" Background="#FF3E3E42"
   170→                              HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"/>
   171→
   172→                <!-- ═══ 우측 하단: 로그 ═══ -->
   173→                <Border Grid.Row="4" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0" Margin="6,0,6,6">
   174→                    <DockPanel>
   175→                        <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="로그" Style="{StaticResource HeaderStyle}"/>
   176→                        <ListBox x:Name="LstLog"
   177→                                 Background="#FF1E1E1E" Foreground="#FF90C090"
   178→                                 BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="1"
   179→                                 FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="11"
   180→                                 ScrollViewer.HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"/>
   181→                    </DockPanel>
   182→                </Border>
   183→          </Grid>
   184→        </Border>
   185→
   186→        <!-- ═══ 중앙: 3D 뷰어 (나머지 영역 채움) ═══ -->
   187→        <helix:HelixViewport3D x:Name="Viewport3D"
   188→                               Background="#FF1A1A1D"
   189→                               ShowCoordinateSystem="True"
   190→                               ShowViewCube="True"
   191→                               ZoomExtentsWhenLoaded="False">
   192→            <helix:DefaultLights/>
   193→            <helix:GridLinesVisual3D Width="3000" Length="3000"
   194→                                     MajorDistance="500" MinorDistance="100"
   195→                                     Thickness="0.5" Fill="#40FFFFFF"
   196→                                     Center="0,0,0" Normal="0,0,1"/>
   197→            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="500" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="500,0,-30"/>
   198→            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="1000" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="1000,0,-30"/>
   199→            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="-500" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="-500,0,-30"/>
   200→            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="-1000" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="-1000,0,-30"/>
   201→            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="500" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="0,500,-30"/>
   202→            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="1000" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="0,1000,-30"/>
   203→            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="-500" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="0,-500,-30"/>
   204→            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="-1000" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="0,-1000,-30"/>
   205→        </helix:HelixViewport3D>
   206→
   207→    </DockPanel>
   208→</Window>
   209→

file.content:
<Window x:Class="TmRobotEx.MainWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:helix="http://helix-toolkit.org/wpf"
        Title="TmRobot Ex — TM12 + OnRobot Screwdriver"
        Width="1920" Height="1080"
        Background="#FF1E1E1E" WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
        WindowState="Maximized"
        Icon="fauto.ico" Closing="Window_Closing">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- 공통 버튼 -->
        <Style x:Key="BtnStyle" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF3C3C3C"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFE0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#FF555555"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="10,4"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 라벨 -->
        <Style x:Key="LblStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFB0B0B0"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 섹션 헤더 -->
        <Style x:Key="HeaderStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFE0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="13"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,0,0,4"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 입력 TextBox -->
        <Style x:Key="InputStyle" TargetType="TextBox">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFE0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#FF555555"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="4,2"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 구분선 -->
        <Style x:Key="SepStyle" TargetType="Separator">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF3E3E42"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,6"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <DockPanel>
        <!-- ═══ 메뉴바 ═══ -->
        <Menu DockPanel.Dock="Top" Background="#FF2D2D30" Foreground="#FFE0E0E0" FontSize="12">
            <MenuItem Header="연결(_C)">
                <MenuItem x:Name="MenuRobotConnect" Header="로봇 연결" Click="MenuRobotConnect_Click"/>
                <MenuItem x:Name="MenuRobotDisconnect" Header="로봇 해제" Click="MenuRobotDisconnect_Click" IsEnabled="False"/>
                <Separator/>
                <MenuItem x:Name="MenuBridgeStart" Header="브릿지 시작" Click="MenuBridgeStart_Click"/>
                <MenuItem x:Name="MenuBridgeStop" Header="브릿지 중지" Click="MenuBridgeStop_Click" IsEnabled="False"/>
            </MenuItem>
            <MenuItem Header="시나리오(_S)">
                <MenuItem Header="새 시나리오" Click="MenuScenarioNew_Click"/>
                <MenuItem Header="불러오기..." Click="MenuScenarioLoad_Click"/>
                <MenuItem Header="저장..." Click="MenuScenarioSave_Click"/>
            </MenuItem>
            <MenuItem Header="설정(_O)" Click="MenuSettings_Click"/>
        </Menu>

        <!-- ═══ 상태바 ═══ -->
        <StatusBar DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Background="#FF252528" Height="26">
            <StatusBarItem>
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                    <Ellipse x:Name="IndRobot" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#FF666666" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                    <TextBlock x:Name="TxtStatusRobot" Text="로봇: 미연결" Foreground="#FF909090" FontSize="11"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </StatusBarItem>
            <Separator Background="#FF3E3E42"/>
            <StatusBarItem>
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                    <Ellipse x:Name="IndBridge" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#FF666666" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                    <TextBlock x:Name="TxtStatusBridge" Text="브릿지: 중지" Foreground="#FF909090" FontSize="11"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </StatusBarItem>
            <Separator Background="#FF3E3E42"/>
            <StatusBarItem>
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                    <Ellipse x:Name="IndCb" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#FF666666" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                    <TextBlock x:Name="TxtStatusCb" Text="CB: 미연결" Foreground="#FF909090" FontSize="11"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </StatusBarItem>
            <Separator Background="#FF3E3E42"/>
            <StatusBarItem>
                <TextBlock x:Name="TxtUpdateRate" Text="갱신: -" Foreground="#FF909090" FontSize="11"/>
            </StatusBarItem>
        </StatusBar>

        <!-- ═══ 우측 패널 ═══ -->
        <Border DockPanel.Dock="Right" Width="560" Background="#FF252528"
                BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="1,0,0,0"
                Panel.ZIndex="10">
          <Grid>
                <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <RowDefinition Height="*" MinHeight="200"/>
                    <RowDefinition Height="5"/>
                    <RowDefinition Height="200" MinHeight="100"/>
                    <RowDefinition Height="5"/>
                    <RowDefinition Height="220" MinHeight="100"/>
                </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                <!-- ═══ 우측 상단: 작업판 ═══ -->
                <Border Grid.Row="0" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0,0,0,0" Margin="6,6,6,0">
                    <DockPanel>
                        <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="작업판 (9×15)" Style="{StaticResource HeaderStyle}"/>
                        <!-- 통계 -->
                        <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,4,0,0">
                            <TextBlock Text="총:" Style="{StaticResource LblStyle}" Margin="0,0,2,0"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="TxtPlateTotal" Text="135" Foreground="#FFE0E0E0" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,10,0"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="OK:" Style="{StaticResource LblStyle}" Margin="0,0,2,0"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="TxtPlateOk" Text="0" Foreground="#FF60C060" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,10,0"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="NG:" Style="{StaticResource LblStyle}" Margin="0,0,2,0"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="TxtPlateNg" Text="0" Foreground="#FFC06060" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,10,0"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="진행률:" Style="{StaticResource LblStyle}" Margin="0,0,2,0"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="TxtPlatePercent" Text="0%" Foreground="#FFE0E0E0" FontSize="12"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <!-- 작업판 Canvas 영역 -->
                        <Border Background="#FF1A1A1D" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="2">
                            <Canvas x:Name="WorkPlateCanvas" ClipToBounds="True"/>
                        </Border>
                    </DockPanel>
                </Border>

                <GridSplitter Grid.Row="1" Height="5" Background="#FF3E3E42"
                              HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"/>

                <!-- ═══ 우측 중간: 시나리오 ═══ -->
                <Border Grid.Row="2" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0" Margin="6,0,6,0">
                    <DockPanel>
                        <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="시나리오" Style="{StaticResource HeaderStyle}"/>
                        <!-- 시나리오 버튼바 -->
                        <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Top" Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                            <Button x:Name="BtnScenarioRun" Content="▶ 실행" Style="{StaticResource BtnStyle}"
                                    Width="70" Click="BtnScenarioRun_Click"/>
                            <Button x:Name="BtnScenarioStop" Content="■ 정지" Style="{StaticResource BtnStyle}"
                                    Width="70" Click="BtnScenarioStop_Click" IsEnabled="False"/>
                            <Button x:Name="BtnScenarioAdd" Content="+ 추가" Style="{StaticResource BtnStyle}"
                                    Width="70" Click="BtnScenarioAdd_Click"/>
                            <Button x:Name="BtnScenarioRemove" Content="- 삭제" Style="{StaticResource BtnStyle}"
                                    Width="70" Click="BtnScenarioRemove_Click"/>
                            <Button x:Name="BtnScenarioUp" Content="▲" Style="{StaticResource BtnStyle}"
                                    Width="36" Click="BtnScenarioUp_Click"/>
                            <Button x:Name="BtnScenarioDown" Content="▼" Style="{StaticResource BtnStyle}"
                                    Width="36" Click="BtnScenarioDown_Click"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <!-- 진행 상태 -->
                        <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" x:Name="TxtScenarioStatus"
                                   Text="대기 중" Foreground="#FF909090" FontSize="11" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
                        <!-- 시나리오 목록 -->
                        <ListBox x:Name="LstScenario"
                                 Background="#FF1E1E1E" Foreground="#FFE0E0E0"
                                 BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="1"
                                 FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="11"
                                 SelectionChanged="LstScenario_SelectionChanged"/>
                    </DockPanel>
                </Border>

                <GridSplitter Grid.Row="3" Height="5" Background="#FF3E3E42"
                              HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"/>

                <!-- ═══ 우측 하단: 로그 ═══ -->
                <Border Grid.Row="4" BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="0" Margin="6,0,6,6">
                    <DockPanel>
                        <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="로그" Style="{StaticResource HeaderStyle}"/>
                        <ListBox x:Name="LstLog"
                                 Background="#FF1E1E1E" Foreground="#FF90C090"
                                 BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="1"
                                 FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="11"
                                 ScrollViewer.HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"/>
                    </DockPanel>
                </Border>
          </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- ═══ 중앙: 3D 뷰어 (나머지 영역 채움) ═══ -->
        <helix:HelixViewport3D x:Name="Viewport3D"
                               Background="#FF1A1A1D"
                               ShowCoordinateSystem="True"
                               ShowViewCube="True"
                               ZoomExtentsWhenLoaded="False">
            <helix:DefaultLights/>
            <helix:GridLinesVisual3D Width="3000" Length="3000"
                                     MajorDistance="500" MinorDistance="100"
                                     Thickness="0.5" Fill="#40FFFFFF"
                                     Center="0,0,0" Normal="0,0,1"/>
            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="500" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="500,0,-30"/>
            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="1000" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="1000,0,-30"/>
            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="-500" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="-500,0,-30"/>
            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="-1000" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="-1000,0,-30"/>
            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="500" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="0,500,-30"/>
            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="1000" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="0,1000,-30"/>
            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="-500" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="0,-500,-30"/>
            <helix:BillboardTextVisual3D Text="-1000" Foreground="#60FFFFFF" FontSize="11" Position="0,-1000,-30"/>
        </helix:HelixViewport3D>

    </DockPanel>
</Window>

message.content:
Your task is to create a detailed summary of the conversation so far, paying close attention to the user's explicit requests and your previous actions.
This summary should be thorough in capturing technical details, code patterns, and architectural decisions that would be essential for continuing development work without losing context.

Before providing your final summary, wrap your analysis in <analysis> tags to organize your thoughts and ensure you've covered all necessary points. In your analysis process:

1. Chronologically analyze each message and section of the conversation. For each section thoroughly identify:
   - The user's explicit requests and intents
   - Your approach to addressing the user's requests
   - Key decisions, technical concepts and code patterns
   - Specific details like:
     - file names
     - full code snippets
     - function signatures
     - file edits
   - Errors that you ran into and how you fixed them
   - Pay special attention to specific user feedback that you received, especially if the user told you to do something differently.
2. Double-check for technical accuracy and completeness, addressing each required element thoroughly.

Your summary should include the following sections:

1. Primary Request and Intent: Capture all of the user's explicit requests and intents in detail
2. Key Technical Concepts: List all important technical concepts, technologies, and frameworks discussed.
3. Files and Code Sections: Enumerate specific files and code sections examined, modified, or created. Pay special attention to the most recent messages and include full code snippets where applicable and include a summary of why this file read or edit is important.
4. Errors and fixes: List all errors that you ran into, and how you fixed them. Pay special attention to specific user feedback that you received, especially if the user told you to do something differently.
5. Problem Solving: Document problems solved and any ongoing troubleshooting efforts.
6. All user messages: List ALL user messages that are not tool results. These are critical for understanding the users' feedback and changing intent.
7. Pending Tasks: Outline any pending tasks that you have explicitly been asked to work on.
8. Current Work: Describe in detail precisely what was being worked on immediately before this summary request, paying special attention to the most recent messages from both user and assistant. Include file names and code snippets where applicable.
9. Optional Next Step: List the next step that you will take that is related to the most recent work you were doing. IMPORTANT: ensure that this step is DIRECTLY in line with the user's most recent explicit requests, and the task you were working on immediately before this summary request. If your last task was concluded, then only list next steps if they are explicitly in line with the users request. Do not start on tangential requests or really old requests that were already completed without confirming with the user first.
                       If there is a next step, include direct quotes from the most recent conversation showing exactly what task you were working on and where you left off. This should be verbatim to ensure there's no drift in task interpretation.

Here's an example of how your output should be structured:

<example>
<analysis>
[Your thought process, ensuring all points are covered thoroughly and accurately]
</analysis>

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   [Detailed description]

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - [Concept 1]
   - [Concept 2]
   - [...]

3. Files and Code Sections:
   - [File Name 1]
      - [Summary of why this file is important]
      - [Summary of the changes made to this file, if any]
      - [Important Code Snippet]
   - [File Name 2]
      - [Important Code Snippet]
   - [...]

4. Errors and fixes:
    - [Detailed description of error 1]:
      - [How you fixed the error]
      - [User feedback on the error if any]
    - [...]

5. Problem Solving:
   [Description of solved problems and ongoing troubleshooting]

6. All user messages: 
    - [Detailed non tool use user message]
    - [...]

7. Pending Tasks:
   - [Task 1]
   - [Task 2]
   - [...]

8. Current Work:
   [Precise description of current work]

9. Optional Next Step:
   [Optional Next step to take]

</summary>
</example>

Please provide your summary based on the conversation so far, following this structure and ensuring precision and thoroughness in your response. 

There may be additional summarization instructions provided in the included context. If so, remember to follow these instructions when creating the above summary. Examples of instructions include:
<example>
## Compact Instructions
When summarizing the conversation focus on typescript code changes and also remember the mistakes you made and how you fixed them.
</example>

<example>
# Summary instructions
When you are using compact - please focus on test output and code changes. Include file reads verbatim.
</example>


IMPORTANT: Do NOT use any tools. You MUST respond with ONLY the <summary>...</summary> block as your text output.

content.text:
<analysis>
Let me chronologically analyze the conversation:

1. User provided a detailed implementation plan for "TmRobot Ex" - a WPF project integrating TM12 robot 3D viewer with OnRobot screwdriver bridge server, work plate visualization, and scenario editing/execution.

2. I explored the reference files from TM12Viewer project and sd_bridge.py to understand existing code.

3. User said "기획서 문서부터 만들고 하지" - wanting the project plan document first.

4. User said "문서작성-내확인후-다음 진행해라" - wanting to review the document before proceeding.

5. I created PROJECT_PLAN.md with detailed specs. User confirmed with "이대로 진행하고 ui 해상도는 1920*1080 100% 임"

6. I created all project files (15 files total) across all steps.

7. Build errors: ReadOnlySpan<string> in async methods (CS4012) - fixed by changing to string[]. Missing System.IO using in BridgeServer.cs - fixed by adding the import. CS8602 nullable warning - fixed with null-forgiving operator. CS0067 unused event - fixed with pragma.

8. Final build: 0 errors, 0 warnings.

9. User asked "다했나?" - I confirmed done.

10. User said "dd" - wanting to run the app.

11. First screenshot showed 3D viewer working but RIGHT PANEL NOT VISIBLE - only 3D viewer taking full screen.

12. User asked "실행하면 자동 연결되는거 아닌가" - expecting auto-connect on startup.

13. I added AutoStartAsync() for auto robot connection + bridge start.

14. Multiple attempts to fix the right panel visibility issue:
    - Added ClipToBounds to HelixViewport3D
    - Wrapped in Border with ClipToBounds
    - Changed from Grid to DockPanel layout
    - Changed to single DockPanel (matching TM12Viewer structure)
    - Added Panel.ZIndex="10"
    - None of these worked - the HelixViewport3D keeps rendering over everything

15. User also mentioned "3d 뷰어 쪽에 작업판도 표시하고..싶은데 (0,0) (0,9) (14,9) 로봇 위치 좌표 주면 3d 뷰어에 표시되되겠냐" - wanting work plate displayed IN the 3D viewer.

16. User asked "sc 확인 어떤 패널 말이냐" - asking what panel I was referring to.

The critical ongoing issue is the HelixViewport3D rendering over the right panel. The status bar is also not visible. Only the menu bar at top shows correctly.

Current XAML structure uses DockPanel with Menu(Top) → StatusBar(Bottom) → Border(Right, Width=560) → HelixViewport3D(fill). This is the same pattern as TM12Viewer which works. The issue persists despite multiple layout attempts.

The most recent work was trying to fix the right panel visibility. I was about to try a Grid-based root layout as an alternative approach.
</analysis>

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user requested implementation of "TmRobot Ex" — a WPF application that integrates:
   - TM12 robot 3D real-time viewer (ported from existing TM12Viewer project)
   - OnRobot Screwdriver bridge server (C# port of sd_bridge.py)
   - Work plate visualization (9×15 grid, 135 holes)
   - Scenario editing and execution engine
   
   Working path: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAEHYUN_PRIVATE\TmRobot Ex`
   Target resolution: 1920×1080 at 100% scaling.
   User explicitly requested: project plan document first, review before proceeding, auto-connect on startup.
   Later user expressed interest in displaying work plate IN the 3D viewer with robot coordinates.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - .NET 8.0 WPF, Code-Behind (no MVVM)
   - HelixToolkit.Wpf 3.1.2 (sole NuGet package) for 3D rendering
   - XML-RPC via raw HttpClient (no external library)
   - System.Text.Json for serialization
   - TMSVR protocol (port 5891) for real-time robot joint data
   - TMSCT protocol (port 5890) for robot control commands
   - TCP bridge server (port 5001) with text protocol
   - Compute Box XML-RPC (port 41414) for screwdriver control
   - URDF-based 6-axis kinematic chain for robot 3D model
   - Dark theme UI with Korean labels/comments

3. Files and Code Sections:

   **Reference files read (from TM12Viewer):**
   - `C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/DAEHYUN_PRIVATE/TM Robot/TM12Viewer/Robot/RobotModel.cs` — URDF kinematic chain with 6 joints, STL loading, tool attachments (angle bracket, quick changer, screwdriver)
   - `C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/DAEHYUN_PRIVATE/TM Robot/TM12Viewer/Robot/TmRobotClient.cs` — TMSVR TCP client with packet parsing, TMSCT emergency stop
   - `C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/DAEHYUN_PRIVATE/TM Robot/OnRobot ScrewDriver/sd_bridge.py` — Python TCP→XML-RPC bridge with 9 commands
   - `C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/DAEHYUN_PRIVATE/TM Robot/TM12Viewer/MainWindow.xaml` — DockPanel layout: StatusBar(Bottom), Border(Right, Width=420), HelixViewport3D(fill)
   - `C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/DAEHYUN_PRIVATE/TM Robot/TM12Viewer/MainWindow.xaml.cs` — Code-behind with connection, data display, emergency stop
   - `C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/DAEHYUN_PRIVATE/TM Robot/TM12Viewer/App.xaml.cs` — Global exception handler (crash.log)
   - `C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/DAEHYUN_PRIVATE/TM Robot/TM12Viewer/TM12Viewer.csproj` — .NET 8.0 WPF project

   **Created files (15 total):**

   - `TmRobotEx.csproj` — .NET 8.0 WPF, HelixToolkit.Wpf 3.1.2, STL content copy
   - `App.xaml` + `App.xaml.cs` — Global exception handler (DispatcherUnhandledException + UnhandledException → crash.log)
   - `Robot/RobotModel.cs` — Direct port from TM12Viewer, namespace changed to TmRobotEx.Robot
   - `Robot/TmRobotClient.cs` — Direct port from TM12Viewer, namespace changed to TmRobotEx.Robot
   - `Bridge/ComputeBoxClient.cs` — XML-RPC client using HttpClient with manual XML construction/parsing. Methods: ConfigAsync, PickupScrewAsync, TightenAsync, LoosenAsync, MoveShankAsync, StopAsync, GetBusyAsync, GetTorqueAsync, GetErrorCodeAsync, GetZSafetyActivatedAsync, CallRawAsync
   - `Bridge/BridgeServer.cs` — TcpListener-based TCP 5001 server. 12 commands (9 base + 3 extended: next_hole, hole_result, get_coord). SemaphoreSlim command serialization. Busy polling with wait_start support.
   - `WorkPlate/HoleData.cs` — HoleStatus enum (Empty/Ok/Ng), HoleData class (Col, Row, Status, AchievedTorque)
   - `WorkPlate/WorkPlateData.cs` — 9×15 grid (135 holes, 20mm pitch), SetResult, Reset, GetNextEmpty, stat counters
   - `WorkPlate/WorkPlatePanel.cs` — Canvas-based visualization with color-coded holes (gray/green/red), torque text, click events, highlight support
   - `Scenario/ScenarioModels.cs` — ScrewOperation (Col, Row, Command, Force, Length, Torque), ScrewScenario (Name, Description, Operations list, JSON serialization)
   - `Scenario/ScenarioRunner.cs` — Sequential execution engine using ComputeBoxClient, with StepStarted/StepCompleted/ScenarioCompleted/ErrorOccurred events, cancellation support
   - `Settings/AppSettings.cs` — JSON settings (robot host/port, bridge port, CB URL/timeout, default force/length/torque)
   - `Settings/SettingsDialog.xaml` + `.cs` — Settings dialog with dark theme
   - `PROJECT_PLAN.md` — Full project specification document
   - `CLAUDE.md` — Project documentation with work history

   **MainWindow.xaml current state (critical - has layout issue):**
   Root layout is DockPanel with Menu(Top) → StatusBar(Bottom) → Border(Right, Width=560, Panel.ZIndex=10) → HelixViewport3D(fill). This is the same pattern as TM12Viewer but the right panel is NOT rendering visibly.

   **MainWindow.xaml.cs key additions:**
   - `AutoStartAsync()` method added to Loaded event — auto-starts bridge server then robot connection
   - Full event wiring for robot client, bridge server, work plate, scenario runner
   - AddLog method with file logging to app.log

   **STL files copied (10):** tm12-base.stl, tmr_750w_01.stl, tm12-arm1.stl, tm12-arm2.stl, tmr_100w_01.stl, tmr_100w_02.stl, tmr_ee.stl, angle_bracket.stl, quick_changer_robot.stl, screwdriver.stl + fauto.ico

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **CS4012 (6 errors)**: `ReadOnlySpan<string>` cannot be used in async methods. Fixed by changing `ReadOnlySpan<string> args` to `string[] args` in all async command methods, and `parts.AsSpan(1)` to `parts[1..]`.
   - **CS0246 (2 errors)**: `StreamReader`/`StreamWriter` not found. Fixed by adding `using System.IO;` to BridgeServer.cs.
   - **CS8602 (1 warning)**: Nullable dereference on `Viewport3D.CameraController.CameraTarget`. Fixed with null-forgiving operator `!`.
   - **CS0067 (1 warning)**: Unused `LogMessage` event in ComputeBoxClient. Fixed with `#pragma warning disable CS0067`.
   - **FileLoadException**: DLL locked by previous process. Fixed with `rm -rf bin obj` + clean rebuild.
   - **CRITICAL ONGOING: Right panel not visible** — HelixViewport3D renders over the entire window area, hiding the right panel (work plate, scenario, log) and status bar. Only the top menu bar is visible. Multiple layout approaches tried without success (see Problem Solving section).

5. Problem Solving:
   **Solved:**
   - All build errors resolved (ReadOnlySpan in async, missing using, nullable warnings)
   - Auto-connect on startup implemented
   - Robot connection works (3D model shows real-time joint positions from robot at 192.168.1.50)
   - Bridge server starts and connects to Compute Box successfully
   
   **ONGOING — Right panel not visible (critical UI bug):**
   The HelixViewport3D renders over the entire window, hiding the right panel and status bar. Attempted fixes:
   1. Grid with column definitions (2*, 5, *) — failed
   2. ClipToBounds="True" on HelixViewport3D — failed
   3. Wrapping HelixViewport3D in Border with ClipToBounds — failed
   4. Nested DockPanel with right panel docked first — failed
   5. Single DockPanel matching TM12Viewer structure exactly (Border DockPanel.Dock="Right" Width="560" before HelixViewport3D fill) — failed
   6. Panel.ZIndex="10" on right panel Border — failed
   
   The TM12Viewer project uses the EXACT same DockPanel pattern and works correctly. The difference is unclear. Next attempt planned was to use a Grid-based root layout with explicit row/column constraints instead of DockPanel.

6. All user messages:
   - "Implement the following plan: [detailed TmRobot Ex project plan with 6 steps]"
   - "ㄱㄱ" (go go - proceed)
   - "기획서 문서부터 만들고 하지" (create the project plan document first)
   - "문서작성-내확인후-다음 진행해라" (write document, I'll review, then proceed)
   - "이대로 진행하고 ui 해상도는 1920*1080 100% 임" (proceed as-is, UI resolution is 1920x1080 100%)
   - "다했나?" (are you done?)
   - "dd" (shorthand for proceed/run it)
   - "실행하면 자동 연결되는거 아닌가" (shouldn't it auto-connect when running?)
   - "3d 뷰어 쪽에 작업판도 표시하고..싶은데 (0,0) (0,9) (14,9) 로봇 위치 좌표 주면 3d 뷰어에 표시되되겠냐" (want to display work plate in the 3D viewer too - if given robot coordinates for (0,0), (0,9), (14,9) can it be displayed in 3D viewer?)
   - "sc 확인 어떤 패널 말이냐" (sc check - which panel are you talking about?)

7. Pending Tasks:
   - **Fix the right panel visibility issue** — The HelixViewport3D is rendering over all other UI elements except the top menu bar. This is the primary blocking issue.
   - **3D work plate visualization** — User wants the work plate displayed IN the 3D viewer using robot coordinates for corners (0,0), (0,9), (14,9). This was a new request that hasn't been addressed yet.
   - User's question "sc 확인 어떤 패널 말이냐" hasn't been directly answered.

8. Current Work:
   Actively debugging why the right panel (containing work plate canvas, scenario editor, and log) is not visible in the UI. The HelixViewport3D takes the full window width and height, rendering over the right panel and status bar. The current MainWindow.xaml uses a DockPanel root layout:
   ```xml
   <DockPanel>
       <Menu DockPanel.Dock="Top"/>
       <StatusBar DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Height="26"/>
       <Border DockPanel.Dock="Right" Width="560" Background="#FF252528"
               BorderBrush="#FF3E3E42" BorderThickness="1,0,0,0"
               Panel.ZIndex="10">
         <Grid><!-- right panel content --></Grid>
       </Border>
       <helix:HelixViewport3D x:Name="Viewport3D" .../>
   </DockPanel>
   ```
   Six different layout approaches have been tried and all failed. The app runs correctly otherwise (robot connects, bridge starts, CB connects confirmed via app.log). The last planned approach was to restructure the root layout to use a Grid with explicit row/column definitions instead of DockPanel.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Try restructuring MainWindow.xaml to use a Grid-based root layout instead of DockPanel:
   ```xml
   <Grid>
     <Grid.RowDefinitions>
       <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>  <!-- Menu -->
       <RowDefinition Height="*"/>     <!-- Main content -->
       <RowDefinition Height="26"/>    <!-- StatusBar -->
     </Grid.RowDefinitions>
     <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
       <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>    <!-- 3D viewer -->
       <ColumnDefinition Width="560"/>  <!-- Right panel -->
     </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
     <Menu Grid.Row="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2"/>
     <helix:HelixViewport3D Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0"/>
     <Grid Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1"/>  <!-- right panel -->
     <StatusBar Grid.Row="2" Grid.ColumnSpan="2"/>
   </Grid>
   ```
   This enforces strict cell boundaries via Grid layout instead of relying on DockPanel fill behavior that HelixViewport3D seems to violate.
</summary>
